scripts.test: npm run test --workspaces --if-present && npm run contract:check
scripts.pretypecheck: npm --workspace=@diagram-as-code/contracts run build && npm --workspace=@diagram-as-code/diagram-config run build
scripts.release:prepare: npm audit && npm run typecheck && npm test && npm run build && npm --workspace=diagram-as-code-vscode run package && npm run release:bundle
